title: Broken NGINX
description: The web service is down because NGINX failed to start. Diagnose the issue, repair the configuration, and restore HTTP on port 80.

ports.label: Web Service
ports.hint: Open this in your browser when checking the web service.

tasks: SSH into the lab using the Lab Terminal
Start NGINX and confirm the web service responds

objectivesPublic.label: SSH into the lab
objectivesPublic.text: Connect from the Lab Terminal using your session credentials.
objectivesPublic.hint: Use the session credentials shown in the lab panel with the integrated terminal.

objectivesPublic.label: Inspect the web service
objectivesPublic.text: Validate the web server configuration and check whether the site responds.
objectivesPublic.hint: NGINX can test config without starting the daemon — then try the published web route from your browser.

objectivesPublic.label: Restore HTTP
objectivesPublic.text: Repair the broken site configuration and bring the service back online.
objectivesPublic.hint: Syntax errors often live under sites-enabled. After fixing, reload or start the service and confirm something listens on port 80.

questions.prompt: Which command tests NGINX configuration syntax without starting the server?

ticket.summary: Company website stopped loading after a config update.
ticket.description: Users report a 502 Bad Gateway error after last night's maintenance on the public web stack.

history.author: Monitoring Bot
history.message: HTTP health checks failing on web service (502).

history.author: Web Team
history.message: Last change involved nginx configuration cleanup in sites-enabled.

timeline.label: Change window
timeline.detail: nginx site config updated during scheduled maintenance.

timeline.label: Customer reports
timeline.detail: Helpdesk queue spike — users cannot reach the homepage.

monitoringAlerts.title: HTTP 502 — web-frontend
monitoringAlerts.message: Upstream returned bad gateway for 100% of probes in us-east.

postLabReview.summary: You restored the public web service by repairing the broken NGINX configuration.
postLabReview.rootCause: A syntax or directive error in the nginx site config prevented the daemon from serving HTTP on port 80.
